title: Compliance Analyst
description: FedEx Operations Support is hiring a Compliance Analyst to monitor adherence with federal transportation regulations, international shipping standards, and internal operational procedures. Working remotely from our nationwide team, you will evaluate operational processes, identify compliance gaps, and recommend corrective actions. Your analytical work ensures FedEx maintains its reputation as a trusted logistics partner while protecting the company from regulatory exposure.
responsibilities: Review shipment documentation and carrier compliance records against DOT, IATA, and HAZMAT regulations
Conduct monthly internal audits on select facilities, documenting findings and tracking remediation timelines
Coordinate with regional operations managers to develop and implement compliance improvement plans
Analyze incident reports to identify systemic compliance issues and recommend preventive measures
Maintain tracking database of regulatory updates and their operational impact
Prepare quarterly compliance scorecards for senior leadership review

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in business, operations, regulatory affairs, or related field
skills: Knowledge of DOT and IATA regulations
Attention to detail in complex regulatory environments
certifications: Preferred: DOT HazMat certification or in-progress training

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance coverage beginning day one
401(k) with company match (6% after one year)
Tuition reimbursement program for job-related courses
Remote work allowance and home office setup stipend
